title: Shortlist
tagline: Pick a few favorites and get a movie mix built around your taste
summary: Pick one to five movies you already love and Shortlist builds a fresh set of recommendations from the overlap in your taste. I trained that exact flow, built the Go API, and shipped the full product.
outcome: On an untouched 7,060-user test, the five-favorite flow reached 84.1% HitRate@10 and 0.331 Recall@100, compared with 73.8% and 0.228 for popularity.
role: Built the retrieval model, Go serving system, and web app myself
proofPoints: 84.1% HitRate@10 on an untouched 7,060-user five-favorite test
0.331 Recall@100 versus 0.228 for popularity, about 45% higher
Exact retrieval across 87,585 movies with a 4.0 ms local median
